title: isotoma sessiliflora
intro: Isotoma sessiliflora, also known as the grassy-leaved isotoma or grassy-leaved boneset, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to eastern Australia and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Isotoma sessiliflora include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Isotoma sessiliflora can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively harnessed.
